# rogersac GitHub Projects

> GitHub Pages landing page for rogersac's public repositories, software experiments, and active work.

This site lives at https://rogersac.github.io/ and serves as a lightweight directory to the owner's public GitHub presence.

## Summary

- Owner: rogersac
- Homepage: https://rogersac.github.io/
- GitHub profile: https://github.com/rogersac
- Public repositories: https://github.com/rogersac?tab=repositories

## What this site contains

- A human-facing landing page with a profile summary and links to public repositories.
- Search-engine discovery files including `robots.txt` and `sitemap.xml`.
- A Google Search Console ownership verification file at `/googleb402e994c33f8edf.html`.
- An LLM discovery file at `/llms.txt`.

## Source of truth

The homepage renders live public repository data from the GitHub REST API. For the freshest list of repositories, the GitHub repositories page is the best source of truth.

## Important links

- [Homepage](https://rogersac.github.io/)
- [GitHub profile](https://github.com/rogersac)
- [Public repositories](https://github.com/rogersac?tab=repositories)
- [Repository README](https://github.com/rogersac/rogersac.github.io/blob/main/README.md)
